# daytona_sandbox_id_from_signed_preview_token (Data Source)

Reads the Daytona sandbox ID encoded in a signed preview URL token.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "daytona_sandbox_id_from_signed_preview_token" "example" {
  signed_preview_token = "signed-preview-token"
  port                 = 3000
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `port` (Number) Sandbox port number from the signed preview URL.
- `signed_preview_token` (String, Sensitive) Signed preview URL token.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Data source identifier.
- `sandbox_id` (String) Sandbox ID from the signed preview URL token.
